backingDescription: The related Janus Henderson JAAA strategy is associated with AAA-rated collateralized loan obligation exposure. Public secondary sources describe JAAA as the Janus Henderson AAA CLO ETF and report that it invests primarily in AAA CLO tranches. Token-specific reserve composition, custody chain, and claim mechanics for Janus Henderson Anemoy JAAA were not verified from official documents in this pass.

_meta.notes: Backing type is based on the related JAAA AAA CLO strategy. Do not publish as institutional-grade until token-specific reserve/custody documents are found.
